home.errorBody: Please refresh and try again in a few moments.
home.heroTitle: The privacy of a home. The service of a hotel.
home.heroBody: Handpicked homes across Portugal, each one operated end to end by our in house team. Your private chef is ready. Your concierge is local. You simply arrive.
home.heroGuarantee: No booking fees. Best rate guaranteed. Concierge response within 1h.
home.uspServiceSub: Private chef, spa, housekeeping. All in house.
home.uspRateSub: Book direct. No commissions. No middlemen.
home.homesTitle: A curated collection of Portugal's finest private homes.
home.homesBody: Every home is personally selected, professionally prepared, and continuously managed by our team. You are not booking a house. You are booking an experience.
home.howItWorksTitle: Three steps to your private hotel.
home.step1Body: Browse our collection. Filter by destination, size, and style. Every home meets the same operating standard.
home.step2Body: Private chef? Airport transfer? Surf lessons for the kids? Our concierge plans everything before you arrive.
home.step3Body: From the moment you land to the moment you leave, our local team is on the ground. You do nothing but enjoy.
home.conceptTitle: Not a hotel. Not a rental. Something better.
home.conceptBody: Every home in our collection is operated like a private hotel. A dedicated local team handles everything, from the welcome hamper on arrival to a private chef cooking with ingredients from this morning's market. No reception desks. No shared lobbies. Just your home, your pace, your rules.
home.conceptPoint1Body: No shared spaces, no schedules. The entire property is exclusively yours.
home.conceptPoint2: The service of a five star hotel
home.conceptPoint2Body: Private chef, in villa spa, concierge, housekeeping, transfers. Every service delivered by our trained, in house professionals.
home.conceptPoint3Body: Our team lives in the regions we operate. They know the hidden beaches, the restaurants before they make the guides, the producers who do not advertise.
home.destBody: From the wild Atlantic shores of the Minho to the sun-drenched cliffs of the Algarve — with the Douro Valley, Lisbon and the Alentejo in between. Every home meets the same standard of quality, service and care.
home.expTitle: Your stay is just the beginning.
home.expGastronomyBody: From a chef's table at home to vineyard tastings in the Douro.
home.expWellnessBody: In villa massages, private yoga, personal training. All PA trained professionals.
home.expAdventureBody: Surf lessons, horseback riding, canyoning in hidden valleys. Guided by locals.
home.expMobilityBody: Airport transfers, private chauffeur, curated road trips across Portugal.
home.ownersTitle: Own a remarkable property in Portugal?
home.ownersBody: We partner with homeowners who share our vision of hospitality. Our management model delivers exceptional returns with zero operational involvement from you. In house teams, hotel grade standards, and a brand that attracts premium guests year round.
home.newsletterBody: No spam. One email per month. Unsubscribe anytime.
home.newsletterSuccess: Welcome to the family. Check your inbox for a confirmation.

contact.heroSubtitle: Tell us about your trip. Our concierge team responds within 2 hours, 24/7.
contact.messageSentBody: Our team will be in touch within 24 hours.
contact.faq1a: Within 2 hours, 24/7. For urgent matters during your stay, our local team can be at your door within 30 minutes.
contact.faq2q: Can I visit the property before booking?
contact.faq2a: Yes. We offer virtual walkthroughs on request, and in person visits can be arranged depending on availability.
contact.faq3q: Do you offer long term stays?
contact.faq3a: Yes. Extended stay rates available for bookings of 28 nights or more. Contact our concierge for a tailored proposal.
contact.faq4q: What payment methods do you accept?
contact.faq4a: Bank transfer, Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Apple Pay.
contact.faq5a: Typically 3 nights, varying by property and season. Our concierge will confirm for your selected dates.
contact.faq6q: Do you work with travel agents?
contact.faq6a: Yes. We have a trade programme with dedicated support and competitive commissions. Contact us for details.

about.heroAlt: Interior of a luxury private villa managed by Portugal Active
about.heroTitle: We do not rent homes. We operate private hotels.
about.heroSubtitle: One team. One standard. {{count}} homes across Portugal, each managed end to end by our people.
about.storyTitle: We started by showing people Portugal. Then we changed how they stay in it.
about.storyP1: Portugal Active began in 2017 as an adventure tourism company in Viana do Castelo, founded by Ricardo Viana — a sports scientist who left academia to build something on the coast he grew up on. Bike tours, horseback riding, canyoning, surf guiding. Then a single property changed everything. We took on one lodge and ran it the way we ran our adventures: with obsessive preparation, personal attention, and a team present from the first moment to the last. Guests noticed.
about.storyP2: We looked at how holiday homes were rented across Portugal and saw the same pattern everywhere: beautiful properties, handed over with a set of keys and a phone number. No team on the ground. No one behind the experience after check-in. So we redesigned it from the ground up — a full-time housekeeping team, maintenance crews, a concierge who lives in the region, a 147-point preparation checklist before every arrival. Not a rental with extras. An entirely new model: the private hotel.
about.storyP3: From one property to {{count}}, each managed end to end by our people. Forbes, The Times, and The Guardian have written about what we are building. We are still based in Viana do Castelo. Still independent. Still growing at over 100% per year. And still driven by the same conviction: the way people experience a holiday home is broken, and we are the ones fixing it.
about.founderCaption: Ricardo Viana, Founder. Viana do Castelo.
about.modelP1: We are not a listing platform. We do not aggregate properties from different owners and hope the experience is good. We partner with homeowners who share our standards, and then we take over the entire operation. Housekeeping, maintenance, guest communication, concierge, quality audits. Everything.
about.modelP2: When you book a Portugal Active home, you are not trusting an unknown owner in another city. You are trusting our team. The same team that inspected the property last week, that stocked the kitchen this morning, and that will answer your WhatsApp message within minutes.
about.modelP3: This is what we mean by "Private Hotels." The privacy and space of a home, with the reliability and service depth of a hotel. One brand. One operating standard. Regardless of which property you choose.
about.standardTitle: Every stay. Every home. No exceptions.
about.standard1Body: 300+ thread count cotton sheets, premium duvets, and full-size bath towels. Replaced on schedule.
about.standard2Body: Our trained team prepares every home before arrival. Not a different cleaner each week. Our people.
about.standard3Body: Professional chefs who shop at the morning market and cook in your kitchen. From breakfast to multi-course dinners.
about.standard4Body: Your concierge contacts you before arrival. Restaurants, transfers, surf lessons, wine tastings. One message.
about.standard5Body: Every home is checked against our preparation checklist before every single arrival. Every appliance, every room, every detail.
about.standard6Body: Local wine, water, seasonal fruit, and regional products. Placed in every home on the day of arrival.
about.socialProofQuote: From the airport transfer to the last morning, everything was seamless. The concierge arranged experiences we would never have found on our own. Truly local knowledge.
about.value1Title: We say no more than we say yes.
about.value1Body: Every home in our collection has been personally visited, inspected, and tested by our team. We evaluate character, functionality, and guest impact. Most properties we visit do not make the cut. The ones that do are held to a standard that gets reviewed every quarter.
about.value2Body: Our team is based in the Minho, not in Lisbon. They eat at the restaurants they recommend. They surf the beaches they suggest. They know the wine producers before they win awards. Local knowledge is not a marketing line. It is our operating reality.
about.value3Title: The best service is the kind you never notice.
about.value3Body: When everything works, when the pool is clean, the wifi connects, the coffee machine is loaded, and the garden is immaculate, it feels effortless. That effortlessness is the product of preparation, checklists, training, and a team that has anticipated what you need before you think to ask.
about.value4Title: We would rather lose a booking than disappoint a guest.
about.value4Body: If a property is not right for your trip, we will tell you. If the weather in the Minho is not what you expect in January, we will tell you that too. Honest guidance before the booking is worth more than a five-star review after it.
about.teamBody: Our team is not in a call centre. They live in the regions where our homes are located. They know the best restaurants because they eat there. They know the hidden beaches because they swim there. When you message your concierge, you are talking to someone who drove past your property this morning.
about.ownersBody: We partner with homeowners who want their property managed to the highest standard. Full operation, zero involvement, and returns that reflect the quality of your home. If you are curious about what we do for owners, we would enjoy the conversation.

services.heroTitle: Designed for you. Delivered by us.
services.heroBody: Every experience is arranged by our concierge and delivered by trained Portugal Active professionals. No outsourcing. No intermediaries. One team, one standard.
services.gastronomyBody: Our chefs are Portugal Active professionals. Trained in our standards, equipped with the best regional ingredients, and available in every home. From an intimate dinner for two to a feast for sixteen. Portuguese cuisine, Mediterranean tasting menus, or something built entirely around your preferences. Wine pairings sourced from producers we know personally.
services.wellnessBody: Professional therapists, yoga instructors, and personal trainers. All part of the Portugal Active team. Every session is designed around you: your schedule, your space, your goals. By the pool, in the garden, on the terrace. No spa reception. No shared changing rooms. Just you and the sound of wherever you happen to be.
services.adventureBody: Canyoning through hidden river gorges. Surfing Atlantic waves at sunrise. Horseback riding along deserted beaches. Every adventure is led by local guides who grew up in these landscapes. They know the trails that are not on maps, the swimming holes that are not on Instagram, the viewpoints that are not in any guidebook.
services.mobilityTitle: From landing to leaving, we drive.
services.mobilityBody: Private transfers from Porto, Lisbon, Faro, and Vigo. Premium vehicles, local drivers who know the roads. Add your flight details and we handle the rest.
services.additionalBody: From grocery delivery to daily housekeeping to childcare. Every detail managed so you can focus on being present.
services.ctaBody: Tell us about your trip and our concierge will design the perfect combination. Reply guaranteed within 2 hours.
services.guestsOnlyBanner: Concierge services are available only to guests staying at one of our properties.
services.guestsOnlyQuestion: Looking for activities open to everyone?

events.heroTitle: Your vision. Our villas. Every detail handled.
events.heroBody: Private homes across five regions of Portugal, an in-house team of chefs, coordinators and concierge, and over 200 events delivered. Tell us your vision and we make it real.
events.typesSubtitle: Each event is built around a private villa, your vision, and our full-service team on the ground.
events.subtitleCorporate: Team offsites, leadership summits and strategy sessions in private villas with dedicated workspaces, private chef, and curated team-building experiences.
events.subtitleWeddings: Intimate destination weddings in villa gardens overlooking the Atlantic. Ceremony, reception, accommodation and planning, all under one roof.
events.subtitleBrand: Product launches, press trips and influencer experiences at exclusive private venues. Full production support and local logistics.
events.subtitleCelebrations: Birthdays, anniversaries and milestone gatherings. Private chef, curated music, floral design and a dedicated coordinator for your group.
events.subtitleWellness: Yoga, breathwork and wellness programmes in villas surrounded by nature. Private instructors, healthy meal plans and spa treatments on site.
events.subtitleCreative: Photography, painting, ceramics or cooking workshops in inspiring settings. We handle the venue, materials, catering and guest logistics.
events.venueTitle: Not a hotel ballroom. Your own home in Portugal.
events.venueBody: Every event takes place in a private property selected specifically for your group, your occasion and your guest count. No shared spaces, no compromise.
events.venueBullet1: 15+ inspected properties across Minho, Porto, Lisbon, Alentejo and Algarve
events.venueBullet2: In-house private chef, housekeeping and dedicated event coordinator
events.venueBullet3: Full production: lighting, sound, florals, photography, transport
events.venueBullet4: Guest accommodation on site or at nearby partner properties
events.processTitle: From first call to final toast.
events.step1Desc: We learn about your vision, dates, guest count and budget. No templates, every event is built from scratch.
events.step2Desc: We propose 2-3 private properties that fit your occasion. Virtual tours or an in-person visit, your choice.
events.step3Desc: Our coordinator builds your event plan: menu, activities, florals, music, logistics, accommodation, transport.
events.step4Desc: Our local team is on site before, during and after. You host your guests, we handle everything else.
events.testimonialQuote: We handed them a rough idea and a date. What they delivered was the most memorable weekend our team has ever had. The villa, the food, every single detail was perfect.
events.testimonialRole: Head of People, London tech company — corporate retreat, Minho 2025
events.ctaTitle: Tell us what you are celebrating.
events.ctaBody: Our event team works with you from concept to execution. One conversation is all it takes to start.

destinationsPage.title: Our destinations
destinationsPage.subtitle: Five regions across Portugal, each with its own character, landscape and rhythm.
destinationsPage.servicesIntro: Our <1>concierge services</1> — private chef, spa, transfers — are available in all {{destination}} properties.
destinationsPage.adventuresIntro: Curated by our local team. Explore all our <1>outdoor adventures</1> across Portugal.

faq.title: Everything you need to know.
faq.subtitle: Clear answers. No fine print.
faq.q1: How does Portugal Active differ from a traditional holiday rental?
faq.a1: Every home is operated to hotel standards by our in house team. Professional housekeeping available in every property, premium linens prepared before arrival, dedicated concierge who knows your name before check in. One team. One standard. One contact for everything.
faq.q2: What is included in every stay?
faq.a2: Hotel quality linens, robes and pool towels. Luxury bathroom amenities. Fully stocked kitchen with coffee, spices and essentials. Welcome kit with curated local products. Dedicated concierge 24/7. Local team minutes away. Access to all in house services. Best rate guarantee when booking direct. Daily housekeeping, private chef, spa, and other services available as add ons.
faq.q3: How do I book a home?
faq.a3: Browse our collection, select dates, and book directly or contact our concierge via WhatsApp or email. We respond within 2 hours with availability, a detailed quote, and a personalised recommendation.
faq.a4: Full refund up to 30 days before check in. 50% refund between 30 and 14 days. Within 14 days: non refundable. Some properties may have specific terms. Your concierge confirms the exact policy at booking.
faq.q5: Can I add services after booking?
faq.a5: Yes. Build your itinerary any time before or during your stay. Add through the website or message your concierge. We recommend booking chefs and popular experiences 48 hours in advance.
faq.q6: Check in and check out times?
faq.a6: Check in from 16:00. Check out by 11:00. Early check in and late check out may be available. Ask your concierge.
faq.a7: Yes. Private transfers from Porto (OPO), Lisbon (LIS), Faro (FAO), and Vigo (VGO). Premium vehicles with local drivers. Add to your itinerary with flight details.
faq.q8: Are your homes suitable for events?
faq.a8: Several properties are ideal for events, celebrations, retreats, and weddings. Visit our Events page or contact our team. We handle catering, setup, entertainment, and logistics through our in house team.
faq.q9: What is the best rate guarantee?
faq.a9: Our website always offers the lowest available rate. Booking direct means lower price than any third party platform, priority concierge support, faster response, and first access to in house services.
faq.cantFind: Can't find what you're looking for?

guide.transferNote: Our concierge arranges private transfers from any airport or station to your villa.
guide.eatDrinkIntroFallback: Restaurants we send our guests to, and experiences our concierge arranges. Not a directory — a personal list.
guide.ownersBody: Portugal Active operates private homes across Portugal end-to-end: marketing, bookings, concierge, maintenance, revenue optimisation. We turn private homes into private hotels.

experience.messageWhatsApp: Message us on WhatsApp to book

careers.title: Join our team
careers.body: We're building something special — a hospitality company that combines the warmth of Portuguese culture with world-class service standards. If you share our passion for exceptional guest experiences, we'd love to hear from you.
careers.lookingTitle: We're always looking for exceptional people
careers.lookingBody: Even if we don't have a specific opening right now, we're always interested in hearing from talented individuals who are passionate about hospitality, travel, and creating memorable experiences.
careers.sendCv: Send us your CV and a short note about why you'd be a great fit.

owners.heroTitle: Your home. Our management. Exceptional results.
owners.heroBody: We manage private homes across Portugal to hotel standards. More revenue, less effort, and guests who treat your property with respect.
owners.whatWeDoTitle: End to end management. Nothing left to chance.
owners.whatWeDoBody: We do not just list your property. We operate it. Our team handles every aspect of management so you receive consistent income without the operational burden.
owners.service1Body: We handle everything. Housekeeping, maintenance, linen service, pool care, garden upkeep, and all guest communications. You do not need to be involved in day to day operations.
owners.service2Body: Dynamic pricing, channel management, and direct booking strategy. We maximise your occupancy and average daily rate while protecting your property from the wrong type of guest.
owners.service3Body: From pre arrival communication to check out, our concierge team manages every touchpoint. We deliver hotel standard service so guests leave 5 star reviews.
owners.service4Body: Monthly reports with occupancy, revenue, expenses, and guest feedback. You always know exactly how your property is performing.
owners.howItWorksTitle: From assessment to operations in 4 weeks.
owners.step1Body: We visit your property, assess its potential, and give you an honest projection of annual revenue and occupancy.
owners.step2Body: Photography, listing creation, pricing setup, and staff assignment. We prepare your property to our standard within 4 weeks.
owners.step3Body: Your property goes live on our platform and selected channels. Our team manages everything from day one.
owners.step4Body: Monthly calls, transparent reporting, and continuous improvement. We treat your property as if it were our own.
owners.portalBody: Access your dashboard, reports, and calendar on our management platform.
owners.formBody: Tell us about your property. We will get back to you within 24 hours with an honest projection and next steps.
owners.formSuccessBody: Our team will review your property and be in touch within 48 hours.
owners.formDescriptionPh: Bedrooms, pool, outdoor space, current rental history...

notFound.title: This page does not exist.
notFound.body: But we know a few places that do.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Body: Portugal Active operates as a property management and hospitality company. We manage private homes on behalf of property owners and provide booking, concierge, and experience services to guests.
terms.s2Body: All bookings are subject to availability and confirmation. Prices displayed on our website are indicative and may vary based on season, duration, and services requested. Final pricing is confirmed at the time of booking.
terms.s3Body: Cancellation policies vary by property and season. Full details are provided at the time of booking. We recommend reviewing the specific cancellation terms before confirming your reservation.
terms.s4Body: Guests are expected to treat properties with respect and care. Any damage beyond normal wear and tear may result in charges to the security deposit. Smoking is prohibited in all properties unless otherwise stated.
terms.s5Body: Portugal Active acts as a management company and is not liable for circumstances beyond our control, including but not limited to natural events, utility failures, or third-party service disruptions. We carry comprehensive insurance and will always work to resolve any issues promptly.
terms.s6Body: For questions about these terms, please contact us at info@portugalactive.com or +351 258 358 434.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you make a booking enquiry, subscribe to our newsletter, or contact us. This may include your name, email address, phone number, and travel preferences.
privacy.s2Body: We use the information we collect to process your bookings, communicate with you about your stay, send marketing communications (with your consent), and improve our services.
privacy.s3Body: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your data with property owners and service providers solely for the purpose of fulfilling your booking and delivering the services you have requested.
privacy.s4Body: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, delete, or port your personal data. You may also withdraw consent for marketing communications at any time. Contact us at info@portugalactive.com to exercise these rights.
privacy.s5Body: For any privacy-related questions, please contact us at info@portugalactive.com or +351 258 358 434.

cookiesPage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPage.whatBody: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide you with a better experience by remembering your preferences, understanding how you use our site, and improving our services.
cookiesPage.howBody: Portugal Active uses the following types of cookies:
cookiesPage.essentialBody: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable basic features like page navigation, access to secure areas, and itinerary functionality. The website cannot function properly without these cookies.
cookiesPage.analyticsBody: We use analytics cookies to understand how visitors interact with our website. This helps us improve our site's structure, content, and user experience. All data collected is anonymous and aggregated.
cookiesPage.functionalBody: These cookies allow the website to remember choices you make (such as your preferred language or region) and provide enhanced, personalised features. They may also be used to remember changes you have made to text size, fonts, and other customisable elements.
cookiesPage.marketingBody: We may use marketing cookies to deliver advertisements that are relevant to you. These cookies track your browsing habits and help us show you content and offers that match your interests. We only use these with your explicit consent.
cookiesPage.managingBody: You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to refuse or accept cookies, delete existing cookies, and set preferences for certain websites. Please note that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of our website.
cookiesPage.thirdPartyBody: Some cookies on our website are set by third-party services that appear on our pages. These include analytics providers and social media platforms. We do not control these cookies and recommend reviewing the respective third-party privacy policies.
cookiesPage.updatesBody: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in technology, legislation, or our data practices. We encourage you to review this page periodically.
cookiesPage.contactBody: If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at info@portugalactive.com.

blog.title: Stories from Portugal.
blog.subtitle: Destination guides, insider recommendations, and stories from our homes and team.
blog.noArticles: No articles in this category yet.

blogArticle.ctaSubtitle: Discover the homes behind the stories.
blogArticle.ctaBody: Every article is inspired by real places, real experiences, and real guests. Explore our collection and start planning your stay.

cancellationPolicy.intro: We offer multiple rate plans with different cancellation terms. Please review the applicable policy before confirming your booking.
cancellationPolicy.flexibleBody: Full refund if cancelled at least 24 hours before check-in. Cancellations within 24 hours of check-in are non-refundable. Changes to dates are subject to availability.
cancellationPolicy.firmBody: 50% refund if cancelled at least 30 days before check-in. No refund for cancellations made less than 30 days before check-in. We recommend travel insurance for additional peace of mind.
cancellationPolicy.strictBody: 50% refund if cancelled at least 60 days before check-in. No refund for cancellations made less than 60 days before check-in. Non-refundable after check-in.
cancellationPolicy.nonRefundableBody: This rate is offered at a reduced price in exchange for a no-refund policy. Once booked, no refund will be issued regardless of the cancellation date. We strongly recommend purchasing travel insurance when choosing this rate.
cancellationPolicy.shortFreeNoDate_one: Free cancellation until {{count}} day before check-in
cancellationPolicy.shortFreeNoDate_other: Free cancellation until {{count}} days before check-in
cancellationPolicy.shortHalfNoDate_one: 50% refund until {{count}} day before check-in — non-refundable after
cancellationPolicy.shortHalfNoDate_other: 50% refund until {{count}} days before check-in — non-refundable after
cancellationPolicy.shortNonRefundable: Non-refundable rate — no refund if you cancel
cancellationPolicy.shortWindowPassed: For these dates the booking is non-refundable if cancelled
cancellationPolicy.shortGeneric: Cancellation terms apply — see our cancellation policy

paymentReturn.missingInfo: We couldn't find your payment information. Please contact support.
paymentReturn.dataLost: Your booking data was lost during the redirect. Please contact support with reference {{ref}}.
paymentReturn.dataCorrupted: We couldn't read your booking data. Please contact support.
paymentReturn.processorUnavailable: The payment processor is unavailable. Please contact support.
paymentReturn.verifyFailed: We couldn't verify your payment status. Please contact support.
paymentReturn.reservationFailed: Your payment was received but the reservation could not be created automatically. Our team has been notified and will confirm your booking shortly. Reference: {{ref}}
paymentReturn.stillProcessing: Your payment is still processing. Please wait a moment and refresh this page.
paymentReturn.notCompleted: The payment was not completed. Please try again or choose a different payment method.
paymentReturn.secureNote: Secure payment — please don't close this window

checkout.notFoundBody: This checkout link has expired or is invalid. Your dates are not lost — start again from the property page.
checkout.quoteExpiredBanner: This price has expired. Refresh to see the current price for your dates — your details are kept.
checkout.datesUnavailable: We couldn't confirm a price for these dates — they may no longer be available. Try again, choose new dates below, or contact our concierge.
checkout.staySubtitle: Confirm your dates and choose your rate.
checkout.emailSupport: We hold your reservation for 24 hours and email you the quote. No spam.
checkout.paySubtitle: Your details, then a secure payment.
checkout.nifPh: NIF — optional, for a Portuguese invoice
checkout.refreshBeforePay: Refresh the price above before paying.
checkout.alreadyPaidBody: The payment for this stay was completed. Check your email for the confirmation, or view your booking below.
checkout.customizeSubtitle: Add services and experiences — or continue as is. Nothing is pre-selected.
checkout.extrasChargedLater: Charged after concierge confirmation — not included in today's payment.
checkout.extrasChargeNote: Extras are confirmed by our concierge and charged only after confirmation — nothing is charged for them today. On-request items are quoted individually.

hamper-gourmet.name: Welcome hamper — regional gourmet

massage.name: In-home massage

exp-heritage.name: Heritage & culture tour

checkout.emailTitle: Where should we send your booking?

flex.title: Flex — guaranteed rebooking
flex.tagline: Rebook whenever you need. The amount you paid is never lost.
flex.benefit1: Rebook up to {{days}} days before check-in, at no cost
flex.benefit2: The amount you paid stays protected — it is never lost
flex.benefit3: Credit valid for {{months}} months, at any home in the portfolio
flex.copyNonRefundable: You chose the best price. With Flex, the value is never lost: rebook up to {{days}} days before check-in.
flex.copyFlexible: Your rate allows free cancellation until {{date}}. After that date, Flex guarantees you can rebook up to {{days}} days before check-in without losing the value.
flex.rule1: Rebook at no cost up to {{days}} days before check-in, as many times as you need — with one active booking at a time.
flex.rule2: What is protected is the amount you paid — not the dates or the home. Current prices apply to the new dates.
flex.rule3: When you rebook, the amount paid becomes credit valid for {{months}} months, usable at any home in the portfolio.
flex.rule4: If the new stay costs more, you only pay the difference. If it costs less, the balance stays as credit.
flex.rule5: Extras move with your booking whenever the service allows; otherwise their value also converts to credit.
flex.rule6: Flex can only be purchased at checkout and is non-refundable.
flex.honesty: If you cancel within your rate's free-cancellation window, we refund your money as per the policy. Flex never replaces that right — it adds protection beyond it.
